notes: Source: US TikTok+Amazon Reporting workbook (~310K chars).
Months represent Jan'26, Feb'26, Mar'26, Apr'26, May'26 MTD (as of May 13/14, 2026).
TikTok-only monthly P&L summary sections only exist for TURMERIC CURCUMIN (offset 818) and USA COFFEE (offset 2084) - these have full P&L through CM2.

For Shatavari and Ashwagandha Caps, NO dedicated Tiktok-only summary P&L sections exist. Their monthly Tiktok-only values were extracted from the daily-detail tables at offset 263404 (Shatavari) and offset 278196 (Ashwagandha Caps).
Shatavari Tiktok daily table ends at ACOS% row - it does NOT include Abs CM2 or CM2 % rows.
Ashwagandha Caps Tiktok daily table ends at Affiliated Commission row - it does NOT include ROI, ACOS, Abs CM2 or CM2 % rows.

Per-pack unit cost ladders (MSRP, COGS, Commission, Storage, VAT, Fulfillment, Shipping) are NOT present in this US workbook. Only TURMERIC CURCUMIN has a separate 'P3' (Pack of 3) variant daily table at offset 293942, but with no cost-ladder structure.
An additional 'Vahdam KSM-66 Ashwagandha 625mg with Ginger & Piperine' section exists at 154832 but is Amazon-only.
Coffee CM1 % March (37.3) and ACOS (128.5) verified consistent with prior extraction. Abs CM2 March = -$27,431.
Note: TURMERIC CURCUMIN CM1 % shows 1513.1% (Mar) and 1506.3% (Apr), 344.4% (May MTD) - these are workbook formula errors, kept as-is from source.
USA March PnL summary table at offset 40113 confirms TikTok-only monthly values: Coffee=$30,077, Turmeric=$87,127, Shatavari=$614, Ashwagandha Caps=$6,948 (Mar TikTok Revenue).
